title: Senior Software Engineer - Narayana Health Digital - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Narayana Health Digital - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Narayana Health Digital invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Software Engineer at our Jabalpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Narayana Health Digital:
Narayana Health Digital is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Health Digital!
